Thanks for contributing to Stellar Grooves.

Before submitting, please make sure:

  - [ ] `mvn spotless:apply` has been run on Java changes
  - [ ] You've signed the CLA (the bot will prompt on first PR — see CLA.md)

If this is a security fix, please follow SECURITY.md instead of opening a public PR.
